name: Crockpot Chicken Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts in the crockpot.
2. Mix together the sour cream, cream of mushroom soup, and onion soup mix according to their labels.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken breasts, ensuring they are evenly coated.
4. Cook on low for 4-6 hours or until the chicken is tender.
5. Serve the cooked chicken and sauce over noodles or rice.
